summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-6 through REQ-9) with strong coverage. The backend renames 'category' to 'moduleName', adds an optional attachment field, and updates createTicket. The frontend updates RaiseTicket.tsx with the Module Name dropdown and file attachment input, TicketCard.tsx and TicketFilters.tsx use moduleName, ProviderDashboard.tsx filters by moduleName, and TicketDetail.tsx shows the attachment download link. All 8 module name options are present. Minor gaps exist around the explicit 'Module Name' label in TicketDetail metadata (diff truncated) but file summaries confirm this is addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration from OldTicket (with 'category') to NewTicket (with 'moduleName' and 'attachment'), including a full migration actor type and run function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention or request any migration module or data migration logic. The requirements only ask to rename the field and update functions within the single main actor in backend/main.mo.

hallucinated_features.description: An upload progress indicator (Progress component with percentage tracking via withUploadProgress callback) was added to the file attachment flow in RaiseTicket.tsx.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify an upload progress bar or percentage indicator for file uploads. REQ-9 only asks for a file name preview and remove option, not a progress indicator.

hallucinated_features.description: BlobStorage and MixinStorage modules are imported and used in backend/main.mo with an ExternalBlob type for attachments, rather than a simple optional Blob or base64 Text field.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-9 specifies the attachment field type as '?Blob or ?Text for base64'. The use of an external blob storage mixin system goes beyond what was requested.
